positive: A minimalist, stylized celestial creature, resembling a geometric lion or panther made of glowing nebulae and crystalline starlight. The creature is centered and poised, roaring silently, its mane formed by delicate spirals of cosmic dust. It is set against a deep indigo and midnight blue background, accented by bursts of warm golden and magenta nebula light. The overall composition should be a clean silhouette with high contrast, utilizing flat graphic elements mixed with ethereal glow for a sophisticated, abstract tapestry feel. Clean vector line quality with volumetric lighting and dramatic shadow casting, suitable for apparel printing.
